Why Choose Us

RIDE WITH
CONFIDENCE

Every motorcycle we sell has been personally inspected and tested. We don't list a bike unless we'd ride it ourselves. Honest prices, honest people — right here in Ghatal.

  • 01
    Thorough Inspection
    Engine, brakes, electricals, tyres — every system is checked before the bike hits our floor.
  • 02
    Clear History Reports
    Full ownership history and service records shared transparently. No hidden surprises.
  • 03
    Free Test Ride
    Take any bike for a proper spin before you decide. No pressure, no rush.
  • 04
    RC Transfer Help
    Our sister business SCS Ghatal handles all RTO and ownership transfer paperwork — fast and hassle-free.

Our Sister Business · Ghatal · Est. 2016

ALSO VISIT
SAYAN COMPUTER
SERVICES

Bought a bike? Get all documents sorted at SCS — our trusted sister business in Ghatal. Driving licences, ownership transfers, vehicle registration, and insurance. 15+ years of experience, same-day processing available.

🪪 Driving Licence 📋 Ownership Transfer 🚗 Vehicle Registration 🛡️ Insurance Upto 12% Off 📝 All RTO Works

ADMIN LOGIN

Enter the admin password to add new bikes or remove sold ones from the inventory.

Incorrect password. Try again.

To change password, see instructions in the source code.

ADMIN PANEL
📸
Click to select or drag & drop multiple photos
JPG, PNG, WEBP — up to 20 photos, max 5MB each · First photo = cover
🔒 How to change your password
1. Type your new password below and click GENERATE HASH
2. Copy the hash that appears
3. Open the HTML file in a text editor (Notepad)
4. Find the line: var PASS_HASH = '...'
5. Replace the value inside quotes with your new hash
6. Save the file — done!
Password Strength
✅ Hash generated successfully. Now open your HTML file in Notepad, find PASS_HASH = ' and replace the value with the hash above.
